'''Kaggle''' was a prominent [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] who operated on the planet [[Lanthrym]] and was native to [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. Like all [[Dazouri]], [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] Kaggle had two forms: rest and rage. His career in crime began with petty larceny, but Kaggle rose to eventually command thugs of his own, thanks to his shrewd intellect in rest form and his unstoppable violence in rage form. His archrival was the [[Rakaan]] crimelord [[Lud Chud]].
